context: Tests whether the agent specifies vault="Work" to avoid writing to the wrong vault when multiple vaults are open, uses the daily:append command, and formats the task correctly as a Markdown checkbox.

checklist.name: Specifies vault="Work" parameter
checklist.description: The command includes vault="Work" as the first parameter to explicitly target the Work vault rather than relying on the most recently focused vault

checklist.name: Uses daily:append command
checklist.description: Uses the daily:append subcommand to append content to today's daily note

checklist.name: Content is a valid Markdown checkbox task
checklist.description: The content parameter contains a Markdown checkbox task in the format: - [ ] <task text>

checklist.name: Does not target Personal vault
checklist.description: The command does not use vault="Personal" or omit the vault parameter in a way that could target the wrong vault
